title: cynoctonum bojerianum
intro: Cynoctonum bojerianum, also known as Bojer's cynoctonum, is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae. It is a woody shrub native to the island of Madagascar and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. Cynoctonum bojerianum is used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
